content.content: Point-of-view style content creator who is known for posting skits and lip-sync performances on his former alexander._thomas TikTok account. He had more than 500,000 followers on the platform. He posted his first TikTok in May of 2020. In the video, he found a bird nest that fell out of a tree. The video was set to sentimental music byLewis Capaldi. Outside of TikTok, he is very athletic and enjoys playing basketball, baseball and tennis. He often refers to his dog as his burrito in social media posts. He performed a lip-sync toBruno Mars' "When I Was Your Man."
